body_preview:
Hello Benjamin Barber,

Your iCloud storage is full. Because you’ve exceeded your storage plan, your documents, contacts, and device data are no longer backing up to iCloud and your photos and videos are not uploading to iCloud Photos. iCloud Drive and iCloud-enabled apps are not updating across your devices.

To continue using these iCloud services, you need to upgrade to iCloud+: https://setup.icloud.com/email/prefs/storage?path=STORAGE_AND_BACKUP/CHANGE_STORAGE_PLAN or reduce the amount of storage you are using.


Upgrade to iCloud+ with 50 GB for $0.99 per month: https://setup.icloud.com/email/prefs/storage?path=STORAGE_AND_BACKUP/CHANGE_STORAGE_PLAN


    




The iCloud Team

iCloud is a service provided by Apple.

Apple Account: https://account.apple.com/choose-your-country/
Support: https://www.apple.com/support/icloud/ww

All rights reserved.
subject: Your iCloud storage is full.
